claim_boundary.next_gate: Replace the exact-state-seeded MPS pressure reference with a variational DMRG/MPS solver or compare a real quantum response kernel against this reference after full cost accounting.
claim_boundary.now_supported: A tensor-network pressure reference now measures how finite MPS bond dimension distorts the same B10 D5 Hubbard response rows after projecting back to the fixed particle-number sector.
claim_boundary.still_not_supported: This is exact-state-seeded Schmidt truncation, not variational DMRG, not a deployable tensor solver, not a quantum response kernel, and not an accuracy-per-resource win.

title: B5 MPS/Schmidt-truncation response reference for Hubbard D5 rows
